description: Official Replicate API schema for kwaivgi/kling-v1.6-pro

cfg_scale.description: Flexibility in video generation; The higher the value, the lower the model's degree of flexibility, and the stronger the relevance to the user's prompt.
cfg_scale.title: Cfg Scale

end_image.description: Last frame of the video. A start or end image is required.
end_image.title: End Image

negative_prompt.description: Things you do not want to see in the video
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt

reference_images.description: Reference images to use in video generation (up to 4 images). Also known as scene elements.
reference_images.title: Reference Images

start_image.description: First frame of the video. A start or end image is required.
start_image.title: Start Image

title: kling-v1.6-pro Input Schema
